heading: Omitted
label: 8260, 8261 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 8260 and 8261 were omitted in the general amendment of this part by Pub. L 100–615, § 2(a), , .Nov. 5, 1988102 Stat. 3185Section 8260, , , , directed each Federal agency to periodically furnish Secretary with full and complete information on its activities under this part, and directed Secretary to annually submit to Congress a comprehensive report on all activities under this part and on progress made toward achievement of objectives of this part.Pub. L. 95–619, title V, § 55092 Stat. 3280Nov. 9, 1978Section 8261, , , , authorized to be appropriated to Secretary not to exceed $2,000,000 for fiscal year ending , to enable Secretary to perform analytical and administrative functions under this part.Pub.
